products.description:
Product Name

Lenovo Original 65W AC Small Pin Laptop Adapter

 

Description

The Lenovo Original 65W AC Adapter is specifically designed for Lenovo laptops, offering fast and efficient charging. Its compact, lightweight design makes it an ideal choice for home, office, or on-the-go use. Backed by a 1-year warranty, this adapter ensures your device stays powered up and running smoothly. With advanced protection against overcharging, overheating, and short circuits, it guarantees reliable performance and safety for both the adapter and your laptop.

products.name: Dell  Original 65w 19.5v  3.34a  7.4mm x 5.0mm Laptop Adapter
products.description:
Product Description:

 

Elevate your laptop charging experience with the Dell 65W Laptop Charger! This charger is purpose-built for Dell Inspiron 1546, XPS M1330, M1530 Series laptops, delivering high-performance power to keep your device ready to conquer your day, whether at work or play.

Key Features:

  • 65W Output: Delivers swift and efficient charging to keep your laptop powered up for both work and entertainment.
  • Wide Compatibility: Seamlessly fits a range of Dell Inspiron 1546, XPS M1330, M1530 Series laptops, making it versatile for users with different models.
  • Steady Power: Provides a 19.5V output with a 3.34A current rating for dependable, consistent power flow.
  • User-Friendly Design: Featuring an easy-to-use 7.4*5.0MM pin connector, the charger eliminates the hassle of tangled cords and ensures a simple, reliable connection.

Never let a low battery slow you down again. Invest in the Dell 65W Laptop Charger – a reliable, energy-efficient, and performance-driven solution. It’s your passport to staying connected and powered up wherever life takes you.

Upgrade your laptop’s charging capabilities today, and experience the difference a high-quality charger can make. Order now, and never worry about running out of power again! Make the Dell 65W Laptop Charger your choice for uninterrupted performance.

Don’t wait; stay charged – order yours today!

products.description:
Dell Vostro 3510 Laptop 15.6 Inch | 8GB RAM 256GB SSD+1TB HDD | Core i3-1115G4- 11th Generation | UHD Graphics | Backit KB -Win11+MS Office H&S 2021 | Titan Grey

 

  • 10th Generation Intel® Core™ i3-1005G1 Processor (4MB Cache, up to 3.4 GHz)

  • Windows 11 Home Single Language, English

  • Intel® UHD Graphics

  • 8 GB, 1 x 8 GB, DDR4, 2666 MHz

  • 256 GB, M.2, PCIe NVMe, SSD +1TB HDD

  • Titan Grey

 

 

The performance you need

Daily to-do’s, done: Everyday tasks are quickly handled with ease using 11th Gen Intel® Core™ processors.

Enhanced graphics: Enjoy extra power and optimal everyday performance when you opt for NVIDIA® GeForce® MX350 with 2GB GDDR5 discrete graphics. Only available in combination with 11th Gen Intel® Core™ processors.

More in store: Dual storage options allow for both the smooth performance of SSD and the increased capacity of HDD.

A battery that lasts: With a 41 Whr battery, you know you can rely on your device to power through the day.

Recharge in a flash: Untether from the wall and get worry free power on the go with an 80% charge in one hour using Express Charge

 

Making productivity a priority

Plenty to see here: A 3-sided narrow border along with a 10% higher screen-to-body ratio* than the previous generation makes for an immersive front of screen experience so you can focus more on the work at hand.

Increase your comfort: A large touchpad, 6.4% bigger keycaps compared to the last generation* and a lift hinge for more ergonomic wrist angles all make for more relaxed use. Plus, the lift hinge provides increased air flow, so your device stays cooler.

Efficient tools: Get work done faster with a 10-key numeric pad and a calculator key that populates a calculator with just one touch.

 

Small business serenity

Linking up: An array of ports and slots means you can get connected to what you need, including a USB Type C port (data only) when you opt for discrete graphics (only on configurations with both 11th Gen Intel® Core™ processor and discrete graphics).

No need for spilling tears: A spill-resistant keyboard means less stress if an accident happens.

Hardware TPM 2.0: The Trusted Platform Module 2.0 (available only for systems enabled with Finger Print Reader) is a commercial-grade security chip installed on the motherboard that creates and stores passwords and encryption keys. It verifies that the computer has not been tampered with before booting up and protects your data against external software attacks.*

Simple and secure: The optional fingerprint reader with Windows Hello allows you to easily and securely log in with just one touch.

 

Windows 11 Pro - designed for hybrid work.
The most productive and secure version of Windows yet—but simple for IT.

 

Ports & Slots

1. SD Card Reader | 2. USB 2.0 | 3. RJ-45 | 4. Headset Jack* | 5. Wedge Shaped Lock Slot | 6. Power Jack | 7. HDMI* 1.4 | 8. USB 3.2 Gen 1 | 9. USB 3.2 Gen 1

 

Dimensions & Weight

1. Height: 17.5 mm - 18.9 mm (0.69 - 0.74 inch) | 2. Width: 358.50 mm (14.11 inch) | 3. Depth: 235.56 mm (9.27 inch) | Starting Weight: 1.69 kg (3.72 lb)

Work or play, the Acer Aspire 7 Gaming Laptop is sure to be your ideal computing partner as it comes with a host of features. Boasting a large 39.62 cm (15.6) Full HD LED IPS display, this gaming laptop ensures that every visual, be it while playing games or watching a video, is crisp and vibrant. Powerful Productivity

This laptop packs a punch in terms of performance as it comes with an AMD Ryzen 5500U processor and NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 graphics processor. It not only gives you enough power to seamlessly tackle your work-related tasks but also keeps you entertained as you can play games, watch movies, and do more.

This laptop comes with a dual-band Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) connectivity that helps offer up to three times enhanced network throughput and reduced latency by up to 75% when compared to its predecessor, the Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac) standard.

 

Large Storage

Equipped with a 512 GB M.2 PCIe SSD and 8 GB of RAM (expandable up to 32 GB), this laptop not only helps you store a large number of files and photos but also multitask easily.

You can enjoy fast data transfer speeds on this laptop as it comes with a USB Type-C port. Along with the USB Type-C port, this laptop also comes with one USB 2.0 port and two SuperSpeed USB 5 Gbps Type-A ports (one of these can be used for offline charging). You can also connect an external monitor via the HDMI port.

 

Classy Design

This laptop features a stylish and professional design that is sure to grab the attention of people whenever you take it out of your bag. Moreover, its backlit keyboard helps you work comfortably even in dimly lit environments.

General

Display

The laptop has a screen size of 15.6 in and aspect ratio of 16:9 The resolution of this model is 1366 x 768 pixels and has display density of 100 ppi (Pixels per inch). This laptop also has anti glare screen. This Asus laptop also has 200nits, 45% NTSC Color Gamut For Non-OLED, Screen-to-body Ratio: 83.

 

Processor

 

The processor in this laptop is Quad Core Intel Pentium which is clocked at 1.1 GHz and has 4 MB Cache Memory. Along with this, Asus Vivobook 15 X515MA-BR101W Laptop comes with Intel UHD GPU.

 

Memory

 

1 TB worth of HDD space is available in this laptop. There is 4 GB DDR4 RAM in the laptop.

 

Connectivity

 

The connectivity options for this laptop are Wi-Fi 5(802.11ac) Bluetooth 4.2 (Dual band) 1*1 Wifi, & 4.2 Bluetooth. There are 1 USB 3.0 Ports & 2 USB 2.0 Ports. It also has an HDMI port and WebCam available to have a video call with another person.

products.name: Ant Esports 690 Air Mid Tower ARGB Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports 690 Air Mid Tower ARGB Gaming Cabinet

 

 

  • Multiple Radiator Mounts – For enthusiast-grade cooling dual 360-millimeter radiators are supported on the top and front panel while a single 240mm is supported on the side to keep the most extreme systems cool.
  • Large Storage Options – Dual 2.5” SSD mounts and dual 3.5” HDD mounts the Ant Esports 690 Air is ideal to build any gaming or production system.
  • Movable Disk Bracket – The HDD cage under the PSU shroud is movable and can be slid towards the front to make space for long PSUs and increase it to 220mm if needed.
  • Spacious Interiors – The spacious interior fits upto an E-ATX motherboard configuration. Support for up to a 390mm graphics card, a 175mm CPU cooler, and up to a 220mm PSU in length provides room for upgrades.
  • Four Dust Filters – With magnetic dust filters in the front, side, and top along with a pull tray one on the PSU, the 690 Air facilitates high airflow while filtering out dust particles.

products.name: Ant Esports 510 Air Mid Tower ARGB Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports 510 Air Mid Tower ARGB Gaming Cabinet

 

  • High Air Flow – With a tapered mesh design in the front the 510 Air delivers high airflow to keep even the most demanding systems cool under extreme conditions.
  • Four ARGB Fans – The Ant Esports 510 Flow comes with four high CFM 120mm ARGB fans pre-installed that can be controlled via motherboard software like MSI Mystic Lights, Asus Aura, Gigabyte RGB Fusion, etc.
  • Roomy Interior – Support for up to a 360mm long graphics card, a 160mm CPU cooler, and up to an E-ATX motherboard provides room for upgrades to stay ahead of the game.
  • Vertical GPU Mount – The 510 Air supports vertical GPU support right out of the box so you can flaunt your graphics card with ease.
  • Multiple Storage Options – With two dedicated 2.5” SSD mounts and two interchangeable trays supporting either a 3.5” HDD or a 2.5” SSD gives multiple options to mount storage drives in the order of your choice.

products.name: Ant Esports ICE-521MT Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports ICE-521MT Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet

 

 

  • Ample of storage options: The case has four exclusive SSD mounts and two HDD cages under the PSU shroud.
  • Spacious Interiors: Can house motherboards of up to EATX standards along with a 360mm radiator
  • Dual Chamber Design: Separate PSU shroud to assist in cooling as well as in a much cleaner design
  • Functional IO Panel: 1 x USB 3.0, 1 x USB 2.0, 1 x Audio, 1 x Mic and Reset button
  • Three A-RGB fans: Comes with three 120mm Auto-RGB fans pre-installed in the front and one black fan at the back to cut down overall costs of the buyer.

products.name: Ant Esports ICE-511MAX Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports ICE-511MAX Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet

 

 

  • Mesh Front Panel: The mesh front panel offers efficient airflow for demanding systems.
  • Sliding Tempered Glass Panel: Showcase your build and system lighting effect through a sliding tempered glass side panel.
  • Auto-RGB Fans: Four120mm Auto-RGB LED fans are pre-installed to create an amazing lighting effect, you can control the RGB lighting effects directly from the I/O panel.
  • Excellent Thermal Performance: Optimized airflow due to the large intakes on the front panel; Additional ventilation on the top panel adds thermal support.
  • SSD Bracket: Mount extra SSD on the backside for more storage.

products.name: Ant Esports ICE-310MT Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports ICE-310MT Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet

 

 

  • Unique front panel: The front mesh is fully magnetic and comes with a mosaic-like pattern to make it stand out from the crowd.
  • Ample of storage options: Case has four exclusive SSD mounts and two HDD cages under the PSU shroud.
  • Spacious Interiors: Can house up to eight 120mm fans or a 240mm radiator in the front for the optimum cooling experience.
  • Side-mounted IO Panel: The IO panel is mounted on the side for convenience of use and imparts a unique look at the same time.
  • Dual 180mm A-RGB Fans: Comes with two 180mm auto RGB fans in the front for maximum possible airflow to support high-end builds inside.

products.name: Ant Esports ICE-311MT Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports ICE-311MT Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet

 

 

  • Unique front panel: The front mesh is fully magnetic and comes with a mosaic-like pattern to make it stand out from the crowd.
  • Ample of storage options: The case has four exclusive SSD mounts and two HDD cages under the PSU shroud.
  • Spacious Interiors: Can house up to eight 120mm fans or a 240mm radiator in the front for the optimum cooling experience.
  • Side-mounted IO Panel: The IO panel is mounted on the side for convenience of use and imparts a unique look at the same time.
  • Dual 180mm A-RGB Fans: Comes with two 180mm auto RGB fans in the front for maximum possible airflow to support high-end builds inside.

products.name: Ant Esports ICE-320TG Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports ICE-320TG Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet

 

 

  • Unorthodox Looks – Stylish front mesh panel with three ARGB 120mm fans for that mean yet clean look.
  • Ample Cooling – Can house eight 120mm fans out of which four come pre-installed.
  • Dual Dust filters – The case comes with two magnetic dust filters, on top and bottom, to keep your build clean and dust-free.
  • Spacious interiors – Can accommodate up to 240mm AIO in the front or a 160mm tall air cooler.

products.name: Ant Esports ICE-280TG Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports ICE-280TG Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet

 

 

  • Impressive Front Panel: A honey comb-inspired mesh panel in the front for a unique look with RGB fans.
  • Spacious Interiors: Can house motherboards of up to EATX standards along with a 360mm radiator.
  • Ample of storage options: The case has four exclusive SSD mounts and two HDD cages under the PSU shroud.
  • Optimum cooling: The case comes with one 120mm fan installed at the back and can accommodate a total of eight 120mm fans for the optimum cooling experience.
  • Dual Chamber Design: Separate PSU shroud to assist in cooling as well as in a much cleaner design.
  • Fully Loaded IO panel: 2 x USB 2.0, 1 x USB 3.0, 1 x Audio In, 1 x Mic and one SD/TF Card Reader.

products.name: Ant Esports ICE-211TG Mid Tower ARGB Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports ICE-211TG Mid Tower ARGB Gaming Cabinet

 

  • Futuristic Front Design: Impressive space ship-inspired conical front panel design to make it stand out from the crowd.
  • Ideal for liquid cooling: With support for a 240mm/280mm radiator in the front and a 240mm on top the case is built for liquid cooling.
  • Well equipped IO Panel: 1 x USB 3.0, 2 x USB 2.0, 1 x Audio, 1 x Mic and Reset button laid out in a vertical fashion for an edgy look.
  • Dual Chamber Design: Separate PSU shroud to assist in cooling as well as in a much cleaner design.
  • ARGB Fans pre-installed: Comes with two 120mm ARGB fans out of the box.

products.name: Ant Esports ICE-130AG Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports ICE-130AG Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet

 

 

  • Awesome front Panel with RGB strip – The front panel is a combination of a matte finish and mesh bottom along with an intricately placed RGB strip for the perfect look.
  • Ample Cooling: Can house eight 120mm fans out of which one rear fan comes pre-installed.
  • Dual Dust filters: The case comes with two magnetic dust filters, on top and bottom, to keep your build clean and dust-free.
  • Spacious interiors: Can accommodate up to 240mm AIO in the front or a 160mm tall air cooler.
  • Well populated IO panel: 1 x USB 3.0, 1 x USB 2.0, 1 x Audio, 1 x Mic and Reset button.

products.name: Ant Esports ICE-200TG Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports ICE-200TG Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet

 

 

  • Impressive Front Panel: A mix of mesh and slits the front panel is well ventilated and has an X-shaped ARGB strip to complete the package.
  • Fully Loaded IO panel: 2 x USB 2.0, 1 x USB 3.0, 1 x Audio In, 1 x Mic and one SD/TF Card Reader
  • Optimum cooling:  The case comes with one 120mm fan installed at the back and can accommodate a total of six 120mm fans for an optimum cooling experience.
  • Liquid cooling: Can house a 120mm at the back of a 120mm or 240mm in the front.
  • Dual Chamber Design: Separate PSU shroud to assist in cooling as well as in a much cleaner design

products.name: Ant Esports ICE-200TG Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet
products.description:
Ant Esports ICE-120AG Mid Tower Gaming Cabinet

 

  • Premium finish with A-RGB panel: Solid build quality with a metallic finish and an integrated Auto RGB panel in the front makes it the perfect fit for a modern retro build aiming for a monolithic design.
  • Ample of Cooling: Can house up to eight 120mm fans for the optimum cooling experience.
  • Spacious Interiors: Can accommodate large air coolers of up to 160mm height and dual graphics cards up to 265mm in length each.
  • Magnetic Dust Filters: Comes with dual magnetic dust filters, one at the bottom and one on top for a dust-free interior and easy maintenance.
  • Easy Wire Management: Comes with a perforated PSU shroud for proper ventilation as well as easier and cleaner wire management.
  • Fully Loaded IO Panel: The ICE 120 AG is equipped with 1 x USB 2.0, 1 x USB 3.0, 1 x Audio In, 1 x Mic on the front IO panel leaving no room for any complaints whatsoever.
  • Multiple Storage Options: With a dedicated SSD mount and three caddies, the cabinet can either house two SSDs and two HDDs or one HDD and four SSDs.

products.name: Epson EcoTank L3210 A4 All-in-One Ink Tank Printer
products.description:
Epson EcoTank L3210 A4 All-in-One Ink Tank Printer

 

Designed for impressive prints beyond borders

 

The multifunctional printing solutions - EcoTank L3210 is designed to improve business cost savings and print productivity. Expect a high print yield of up to 4,500 pages for black-and-white, and 7,500 pages for colour. You can even print borderless photos up to 4R size. The integrated ink tanks and designated nozzles ensure spill-free and error-free refilling.

  • Print, scan, copy
  • Compact integrated tank design
  • High yield ink bottles
  • Spill-free, error-free refilling
  • Borderless printing up to 4R
  • Epson Heat-Free Technology
    Achieve high speed printing at lower power consumption with Epson Heat-Free Technology as no heat is required during the ink ejection process.
  • Space-saving Design, Spill-free Refilling
    Compact and sleek, the ink tank design is integrated into the printer to allow the printer to have a small footprint. Additionally, the unique bottle nozzle enables spill-free and error-free refilling.
  • Remarkable Quality and Speed
    Constantly improving to meet the printing needs of small business owners, EcoTank L3210 features printing speeds of up to 10.0 ipm for black-and-white, and 5.0 ipm for colour to deliver better work productivity. In addition, the L3210 is capable of printing borderless photos up to 4R.
  • Superb Savings & High Page Yield
    Don’t compromise on cost as you print. With EcoTank L3210, you’ll be able to save costs as each set of bottle inks has an ultra-high yield of 4,500 for black and 7,500 pages for colour.
  • Epson Warranty for Peace of Mind
    Enjoy warranty coverage of up to 1 years or 30,000 prints, whichever comes first, for maximum value from your printer and freedom from worries over its maintenance. Epson’s warranty includes coverage of printhead, which is most important for a printer designed for high volume printing.
